вЂЋ SYNOPSISвЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ

Being asked for favors isn't Aventurine's usual role. He's the one who pulls the strings, after all. But when you approach him with the bold request to act as your fake lover, the tables turn.

Surprised? Absolutely. Flattered? Even more so.

And while it might start as a harmless ruse, Aventurine can't help but see it as the perfect stage to test his charm... and perhaps blur the lines between performance and something far more dangerous.
